summary.note: every certifier is allowed to peek at every budget. That is legitimate only for the anytime-valid WSR sequence and is anti-conservative for the fixed-n bounds, so the comparison is tilted TOWARD the baselines and against WSR; WSR still does not win, which makes the negative result stronger rather than weaker

rho_summary.note: PPI's (1 - rho^2) is asymptotic and the control-variate variable is unbounded, so this is reported as a measured add-on and is NOT spliced into the finite-sample labels-to-certify curves above
